name: HIPAA — Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act

controls.title: Security Management Process (Required)
controls.description: Implement policies and procedures to prevent, detect, contain and correct security violations. Includes risk analysis, risk management, sanction policy and information system activity review.

controls.title: Assigned Security Responsibility (Required)
controls.description: Identify the security official who is responsible for the development and implementation of the policies and procedures required by the Security Rule.

controls.title: Workforce Security (Required)
controls.description: Implement policies and procedures to ensure that all members of its workforce have appropriate access to ePHI, and to prevent those workforce members who do not have access from obtaining access.

controls.title: Information Access Management (Required)
controls.description: Implement policies and procedures for authorizing access to ePHI that are consistent with the applicable Privacy Rule requirements.

controls.title: Security Awareness and Training (Required)
controls.description: Implement a security awareness and training program for all members of its workforce (including management). Includes security reminders, protection from malicious software, log-in monitoring, password management.

controls.title: Security Incident Procedures (Required)
controls.description: Implement policies and procedures to address security incidents — identification, response, reporting, mitigation, documentation.

controls.title: Contingency Plan (Required)
controls.description: Establish policies and procedures for responding to an emergency or other occurrence that damages systems containing ePHI. Includes data backup, disaster recovery, emergency mode operation, testing and revision, application/data criticality analysis.

controls.title: Evaluation (Required)
controls.description: Perform periodic technical and non-technical evaluation, based initially upon the Security Rule's standards and subsequently in response to environmental or operational changes affecting the security of ePHI.

controls.title: Business Associate Contracts (Required)
controls.description: A covered entity may permit a business associate to create, receive, maintain or transmit ePHI on its behalf only if the covered entity obtains satisfactory assurances, documented through a written contract or arrangement (BAA), that the business associate will appropriately safeguard the information.

controls.title: Facility Access Controls (Required)
controls.description: Implement policies and procedures to limit physical access to electronic information systems and the facility or facilities in which they are housed, while ensuring that properly authorized access is allowed.

controls.title: Workstation Security (Required)
controls.description: Implement physical safeguards for all workstations that access ePHI, to restrict access to authorized users.

controls.title: Device and Media Controls (Required)
controls.description: Implement policies and procedures that govern the receipt and removal of hardware and electronic media that contain ePHI into and out of a facility, and the movement of these items within the facility. Includes disposal, media re-use, accountability, data backup and storage.

controls.title: Access Control (Required)
controls.description: Implement technical policies and procedures for electronic information systems that maintain ePHI to allow access only to those persons or software programs that have been granted access rights. Includes unique user identification, emergency access procedure, automatic logoff, encryption/decryption.

controls.title: Audit Controls (Required)
controls.description: Implement hardware, software and/or procedural mechanisms that record and examine activity in information systems that contain or use ePHI.

controls.title: Integrity (Required)
controls.description: Implement policies and procedures to protect ePHI from improper alteration or destruction.

controls.title: Person or Entity Authentication (Required)
controls.description: Implement procedures to verify that a person or entity seeking access to ePHI is the one claimed.

controls.title: Transmission Security (Required)
controls.description: Implement technical security measures to guard against unauthorized access to ePHI that is being transmitted over an electronic communications network. Includes integrity controls and encryption (addressable).

controls.title: Breach Notification Rule
controls.description: Following the discovery of a breach of unsecured PHI, a covered entity must notify each individual without unreasonable delay and in no case later than 60 days. Breaches affecting 500+ individuals must also be reported to HHS and prominent media. Includes four-factor risk assessment under §164.402.
